<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Anidulafungin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of invasive candidiasis in adults and paediatric patients aged 1 month to &lt; 18 years.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>impetigo（98.8%）</li>
<li>malignant pleural mesothelioma（98.8%）</li>
<li>staphylococcal scalded skin syndrome（98.7%）</li>
<li>pleural empyema (disease)（98.5%）</li>
<li>malignant visceral pleura tumor（98.5%）</li>
<li>bullous impetigo（98.4%）</li>
<li>malignant epithelioid mesothelioma（98.4%）</li>
<li>sarcomatoid mesothelioma（98.3%）</li>
<li>hordeolum（98.2%）</li>
<li>Clostridium infectious disease（98.2%）</li>
<li>pleural neoplasm（98.1%）</li>
<li>inhalational botulism（97.7%）</li>
<li>toxin-mediated infectious botulism（97.6%）</li>
<li>cysticercosis（97.3%）</li>
<li>staphylococcal pneumonia（97.0%）</li>
<li>coenurosis（96.9%）</li>
<li>lymph node palisaded myofibroblastoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>abdominal cystic lymphangioma（96.9%）</li>
<li>celiac trunk compression syndrome（96.9%）</li>
<li>abdominal ectopic pregnancy（96.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
